summary: This is a high-quality, well-structured test suite that fully covers all five functional areas mandated by the task (cache I/O, HTTP retry with backoff, paginated post fetching, comment fetching, and orchestration). Coverage is comprehensive: every exported function has its own Describe block with multiple It cases. Rigor is strong — the exponential backoff test captures exact millisecond delay values (100, 200), verifies sleep call counts, checks that MaxRetries=1 produces zero sleeps, validates precise URI strings for both pagination params and the comments endpoint, and verifies the error message format after retry exhaustion. Design is excellent: unique GUID-based temp dirs in BeforeEach/AfterEach prevent cross-test pollution, -ModuleName scoping on all mocks is correct for intercepting module-internal calls, [object[]] casts guard against single-item pipeline unwrapping, and Describe groupings mirror the TDD red/green sequence described in the comments. Minor gaps preventing a perfect rigor score: no tests for malformed or corrupted cache JSON, no handling of empty API response arrays, no boundary/negative input validation (e.g., Page=0, MaxRetries=0), and the Sleep parameter capture in the backoff test is slightly fragile if the internal parameter name ever changes. Overall this suite would reliably catch regressions across all core requirements.
